privacy.title: Privacy Policy – CyanShip
privacy.description: How CyanShip handles your data: what we collect, why, and your rights.

terms.title: Terms of Service – CyanShip
terms.description: Terms and conditions for using CyanShip products and services.

head.title: CyanShip – From Idea to Revenue in 4 Weeks
head.description: B2B platform development with AI, payments, and auth built in. Next.js + NestJS. Fast time-to-market, zero agency overhead.

hero.description: Production-ready B2B platforms — AI, payments, and auth baked in from day one. Built on a battle-tested Next.js & NestJS core. Zero agency overhead.

problem.label: Approach
problem.heading: Skip the Boilerplate. Focus on Business.
problem.paragraph_1: Most startup budgets are burned on rebuilding authentication, payment integrations, and now — AI features. I've already built all of it.
problem.paragraph_2: With "CyanShip" — my pre-built core — we bypass the setup phase and start building your custom logic on day one.
problem.feature_architecture_description: Built on industry standards. When you hire an in-house team, they can take over instantly without rewriting legacy code.
problem.feature_typed_description: Built for absolute reliability. Your product won't crash during critical investor demos or sudden traffic spikes.
problem.feature_scale_description: A solid foundation with built-in Stripe billing and AI integration. Handles your first 10 paying customers just as easily as your first 10,000.

dogfooding.label: Proof
dogfooding.heading: You Are Looking at the Code Right Now
dogfooding.description: I don't just sell this architecture; I run my business on it. This site — including its AI chat, Stripe billing, and auth — is built on the exact same CyanShip core your product will use.
dogfooding.step_1: Create an account to test the auth flow
dogfooding.step_2: Click the Stripe checkout to see the payment integration

proof_auth.terms_agree: I agree to the <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>

proof_usage.no_transactions: No activity yet. Purchase executions in the Billing tab to get started.

demo_video.label: Demo
demo_video.heading: See It Working. All of It.
demo_video.description: You've tried the individual features. Now watch the complete flow — from first sign-in to AI chat — in one uncut walkthrough.
demo_video.highlight_auth: Google sign-in — three seconds, you're in
demo_video.highlight_billing: Stripe checkout with a live payment
demo_video.highlight_dashboard: Dashboard — balance updates in real time
demo_video.note: Full source code. Zero tech debt. This is your starting point.

workflow.label: Workflow
workflow.heading: No Useless Meetings. Just Daily Progress.
workflow.description: I value your time. My workflow is designed for founders who prefer tangible results over endless Zoom calls.
workflow.step_async_description: Slack and email for structured, searchable decisions.
workflow.step_video_description: Concise Loom screen recordings showcasing new features and UI/UX flows.
workflow.step_code_description: Regular repository pushes. You always own your IP.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.heading: Predictable Pricing. Zero Hidden Fees.
pricing.include_4: AI chat integration with usage-based billing
pricing.faq_1_q: What if I need more complex features?
pricing.faq_1_a: Send a brief or a quick Loom video with your requirements. I'll review it asynchronously and provide a fixed-price quote. No endless discovery calls.
pricing.faq_2_q: Do I own the code and IP?
pricing.faq_2_a: Absolutely. I sign an NDA before we even discuss your idea. Upon final payment, 100% of the Intellectual Property (IP) and source code rights are legally transferred to your entity. No vendor lock-in.
pricing.faq_3_a: 50% upfront to secure your slot, 50% upon successful delivery. I operate as a registered independent contractor. Payments are made securely via SWIFT, Payoneer, or wire transfer against official B2B invoices.
pricing.faq_4_a: I'll set up your deployment on Vercel or your preferred platform as part of the package.
pricing.faq_5_q: What happens after the MVP is launched?
pricing.faq_5_a: You have full control. You can take the clean, documented Next.js/NestJS codebase to an in-house team, or retain me for ongoing feature development via a monthly retainer or fixed hourly rate.
pricing.faq_6_q: Does the MVP include AI features?
pricing.faq_6_a: Yes. The CyanShip core ships with a production-ready AI chat module — streaming responses, per-message billing, rate limiting, and abuse protection. You can use it as-is for customer support or adapt it to your domain. No extra cost.

footer_cta.label: Contact
footer_cta.heading: Have a raw idea? Let's map it out.
footer_cta.description: Turn your concept into an actionable technical plan. Submit your details, and you'll get a clear architecture roadmap and a fixed-price estimate. The document is yours to keep, even if we don't work together.
